translated: Amazing.
Well, we've talked quite a bit, but...
it's still not enough, so we'll continue the discussion next week.
All right!
Anyway, thank you all for sending in so many emails.
Thank you very much.
Now, let's introduce an email for our Lunchtime Request segment.
Here we go.
This one is from a listener named Mizuki-san.
Thank you.
Thank you very much.
'I'd like to request Sky Linker.
My favorite part of this song is definitely right before the last chorus,
the part where you sing, "I'll change it, I'll change it right now."
Mei-chan usually speaks in a low voice, but in this part, she hits a clear high note.
I absolutely love the gap and her soul-stirring vocals.'
That's what they wrote.
Thank you so much.
You can really feel the soul in it.
It's a very passionate song, so please pay attention not just to the vocals, but to the music in the background as well.
Please listen.
Yoneme Mei, "Sky Linker."
You only notice the missing pieces
because you know what the perfect shape looks like.
But that's okay.
I'm far from a god who can end someone's hesitation,
but I'll stay in the rain with you until we find it.
My wish is in the blue sky; take my hand and I'll lead you.
Everything, yes, I'll block out all the uncertainty.
I'll even protect you from fate itself.
Always,
yes, always, don't lose to this depressing world today.
Through
thousands of sunrises, I'll fly and leap toward our destination.
We've become what they call "comrades."
When I pray for someone other than myself, I'll prove there's not a single cloud in my heart.
Dive into the blue sky; if you hold my hand, I'll do it.
Everything,
yes, everything—what's wrong with being weak?
If you want to cry, let's cry and scream; I don't mind.
Always,
yes, always, I'll accept any version of you.
Show me.
It's already cracked, but I'll show you I can catch it all without breaking.
If you want a tough vessel, if you want a clear "now," I'll change it for you right away.
In that blue sky,
if we look up, the brilliant blue will lead us.
Everything,
yes, everything, I'll block out the uncertainty.
I'll even protect you from fate itself.
I'll support you; you have a place here.
Don't you ever lose.
Love Live! Superstar!! Friendship Lunchtime Broadcast Station: Liella!
Radio.
Announcements from Love Live! Superstar!!
Here is the music news.
On Wednesday, July 8th, the release of the
"Liella! no Musubu Project" mini-album has been confirmed.
We will be releasing five versions: the Original, Photo, Team Kodomo, Team Sports, and Team Midori editions.
The Original, Team Kodomo, Team Sports, and Team Midori editions will feature new illustrations,
while the Photo Edition will feature new photos of the cast.
It's expected to include 4 songs in total, including one new group song, plus off-vocal versions for a total of 8 tracks.
As a first-press bonus, the Original, Team Kodomo,
Team Sports, and Team Midori editions will include member stickers.
The Photo Edition will include a Purikura-style sticker.
All versions will also include an advance lottery application ticket for the "Love Live! Series 15th Anniversary Love Live! Fes"
and "Love Live! Superstar!!"
As a bundle purchase bonus, we'll be giving away a Liella!
sticker book.
Don't forget to pre-order.
To celebrate the release of the Liella!
no Musubu Project mini-album, a handover event has been confirmed.
The dates are Friday, October 2nd, and Friday, October 9th.
Those who pre-order or purchase the Liella!
no Musubu Project mini-album at participating stores will be invited to the handover event via lottery.
The performers differ for each date, so please check the application requirements before applying.
Please check the Love Live! Superstar!! official website for details.
An announcement from the Love Live! Series Official Card Game.
The Start Deck "Love Live! Superstar!!",
featuring only Liella! members and songs, will be released on Saturday, May 30th.
